description: Review codebase to see if it aligns with the task definition

steps.prompt: Review the codebase and check whether it correctly implements the backlog task $ARGUMENTS. List any discrepancies and propose fixes for any issues you find. You don't need to create a commit—commits should be done manually by the user. Don't make any changes yet; wait for my approval.
Please proceed with fixing the most severe issue, if any remain.
Review the task details to verify the task has been finalized according to the backlog task finalization guidelines. List actionable items to align with these guidelines and wait for my approval.
Please proceed with fixing the most severe issue concerning task finalization, if any remain. Prefer using backlog mcp to edit the task details instead of directly manipulating the file.

steps.exitCondition: The task is properly finalized according to the guidelines and there are no remaining high- or medium-priority issues
